pi_items.source: Task description (line 6) and export_result.sh (line 7, 57 in verifier.py)
Cube geometry (standard 3D cube has 6 faces). Created in setup_task.sh (line 32) with bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add()

privileged_info_summary: The task boolean_wall_openings@1 involves procedurally generated synthetic data in Blender. The scene is created fresh from setup_task.sh using Blender's Python API with no external datasets. A cube (6 faces) is created as the Wall object with three cutter objects (WindowCutter_Left, WindowCutter_Right, DoorCutter) positioned to create openings. The agent must apply boolean difference modifiers to cut holes and apply them, resulting in face count >=15. Output files are saved to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/wall_with_openings.blend and /home/ga/BlenderProjects/wall_render.png.
